name: keepdeck-session-reporter
description: Reports Kimi Code session identity to the KeepDeck pane that launched it.
author: KeepDeck

interface.shortDescription: Keeps Kimi Code sessions attached to their KeepDeck panes.
interface.longDescription: Reports SessionStart identity only when Kimi Code was launched by KeepDeck. It is inert in every other Kimi session.
